name: BILL
tagline: AI-powered financial operations platform for SMBs with smart bill pay and invoicing
description: BILL is a leading financial operations platform that uses AI to automate accounts payable, accounts receivable, and expense management. BILL AI auto-populates transaction categories, analyzes merchant and transaction history, and learns from user behavior to improve efficiency. The platform supports bill management, invoicing, and payments.
cons: Can be complex for very small businesses
